title: 12 Potent Picks Are December's Ideal Dividend Buys
text: A February 2, 2022, Kiplinger Today special report headlined, "Potent Picks to Profit in 2022,” featured 97 dividend-fetching stocks from 118 in that article. Here is YCharts 11/25/22 update. Article titles were: '65 Best Dividends', '15 Value Stocks', '15 Best Mid-Caps', '10 European Plays', '9 High Yields', '6 Sturdy Defensive Stocks.'

title: Why Energy Stocks Are Falling Today
text: China concerns have caused oil prices to give up 2022 gains.

title: These Were The Five Best And Worst Performing Energy Stocks In October 2022
text: After months of dismal performance, the U.S. stock market climbed in October, with the energy sector recording the largest increase.

title: 3 High-Yield Passive-Income Powerhouse Stocks to Buy Now
text: Investing in equal parts of these three stocks produces an average dividend yield of 5.7%.

title: Cash (Flow) Is King: 2 Cash-Rich High Yielders To Weather The Storm
text: Hedge fund manager and billionaire Ray Dalio recently changed his view that "cash is trash." But if investors had taken Dalio's advice before, they would have no cash with which to invest in his new recommendation.

title: 7 No-Brainer Stocks to Buy When the Fed Is Hawkish
text: With the Federal Reserve raising the benchmark interest rate again, it's time for investors to target no-brainer stocks to buy that may perform well during a period of monetary tightening. While this ecosystem closes many doors in the equities sector, a few well-positioned firms should do remarkably well.

title: 2 Fantastic Stocks For The LNG Boom
text: In this article, we start by discussing why the LNG boom is likely to be even stronger than people expect, given demand developments across the world. I believe that there are great long-term opportunities. One of them is Kinder Morgan, a midstream operator poised to accelerate shareholder value thanks to higher LNG shipments.
